claim_bullets.bullet_text: Here is the most common pattern: Extracting the head and gathering everything but the head from an array: (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.104-105)
We will use a common convention and call variables we gather rest, but refer to the ... operation as a 'gather,' following Kyle Simpson's example. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.104-105)
